name: Tera 18650 Batteries
summary: Looking for a new battery for the Boundless Tera?
description: Looking for a new battery for the Boundless Tera? Your vaporiser is only as good as its battery. Upgrade to the Boundless Tera Battery for longer, more powerful, and consistently satisfying sessions. Tera Battery: 18650 • 35A • 2500mAh Keeps your device charged and ready.
